description: TASK-24 restore-ingress ENVELOPE golden vector — the attested second KEM-DEM layer (2d-hsm-agent-restore-ingress-v1). The operator re-wraps the restore_ingress_v1.bin PAYLOAD to the destination TEE's attested EPHEMERAL ML-KEM-1024 key; AAD' binds the dest measurement + chain/env + manifest hash + the agent_backup_v1.bin digest. TEST KEYS ONLY — the dest ephemeral decaps seed is a public test constant (in the live ceremony this key is GENERATED inside the destination TEE, never off-device).
